textobject.phrase: \begin{array}{r@{{}={}}l} \displaystyle H_{x,y}(\vec{r},z) & \displaystyle \frac{1}{4\pi ^2} \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} A_{H_{x,y}}^{z, d}\e^{-\im\vec{kr}} \d \vec{k}\\ \noalign{\smallskip} \displaystyle H_{z}(\vec{r},z) & \displaystyle \frac{1}{4\pi ^2} \int_{-\infty}^{\infty} A_{H_{z}}^{z, d}\e^{-\im\vec{kr}} \d \vec{k}\\ \end{array}
